tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Starship
Song: We Built This City

[Chords used]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch](v1) 032030
[ch]Cadd9[/ch](v2) 030010
[ch]Cadd9[/ch](v3) 300010
[ch]Cmaj9[/ch]     030000 or 035000

[Intro/Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
We built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch], [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Say you don't know me, or recognize my face[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]                    [ch]D/G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Say you don't care who goes to that kind of place[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
Knee deep in the hoopla, sinking in your fight[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Too many runaways eating up the night[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch](v1) 
Marconi plays the mamba, listen to the radio, don't you remember [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch](v2) [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]                  
We built this city,            [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch](v3)          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
We built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Someone's always playing corporation games[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]                      [ch]D/G[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Who cares they're always changing corporation names[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]
We just want to dance here, someone stole the stage[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D/F#[/ch]
They call us irresponsible, write us off the page[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch](v1) 
Marconi plays the mamba, listen to the radio, don't you remember [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch](v2) [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]                  
We built this city,            [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch](v3)          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
We built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] ([ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]) [ch]G[/ch]   
It's just another Sunday,        [/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
in a tired old street[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]         
Police have got the choke hold, oh----oh, oh, oh, [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D/F#[/ch]
but we just lost the beat[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Who counts the money underneath the bar[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]                    [ch]D/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Who rides the wrecking ball into our guitars[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]
Don't tell us you need us, 'cos we're the ship of fools[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Looking for America, crawling through your schools[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              
(music only)Marconi plays the mamba, listen to the radio, [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch](v1) 
Don't you remember (remember)[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab]   [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
We built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city on rock and roll[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Built this city, we built this city[/tab]
